roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Order - Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Terminated
Order - Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Modified
Motion to Modify Conditions of Release
DEFT'S MOTION PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION (PC1001,83) FILED AT INSISTENCE

/CAL: CUSTODY STATUS/X: MOTION TO DETAIN ORDER MODIFIED/X: HOME DETENTIONORDERED SUBJECT TO SHERRIFS APPROVAL OF LOCATION/X: CARVE OUT, DEFENDANTMAY ATTEND MEDICAL APPOINTMENT AND CHILD CARE NEEDS/ /X: MUST ABIDE BY PREVIOUS CRMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER AND NO THIRD PARTY CONTACT WITH PLAINTIFF/ACM/X: MUST ATTEND ANGER MANAGMWENT CLASSES/WEAP/WS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO//CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: FUTURE PRELIMINARY HEARING CONFIRMED/DOP/
/CAL:PCD PROG RPT/X:DEFENDANT IS TAKING ANGER MANAGEMENT CLASSES & PROVIDED PROOF TO THE D,A, IN THE COURTROOM/PROGPCD:05-24-22/CONTD: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL: PRIMARY CARE GIVER DIVERSION REFERRAL PROGRESS REPORT/CONTD PCD PROGRPT/PROGPCD: 11-16-21/CONTD: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT//DOP/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/STWPX/X: REFERRAL TO PRIMARY CARE DIVERSION/X:COUNT 4 TO TRAIL/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR A PRIMARYCAREGIVER DIVERSION REPORT,/DEF:SHALL ABIDE BY PROGRAM SET FORTH FOR THEMBY THE COURT AND PRETRIAL DIVERSION/PCDIV: 09-28-21/CONT/DOPU:PTD/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 09-27-21 (60TH)/987,2/ACM/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL REMAIN ON ACM WITH TERMS AND CONDITIONS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED/SAORD/SA1: RAMON BONILLA-CASTRO/SA2: INTERSECTION OF NEWHALL AND QUESADA/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, DEFENDANT SHALL NOT POSESS ANY WEAPONS AND COMPLY WITH THE STAY AWAY ORDER/CONTD: PREHEARINGCONFERENCE   TS PX/DOP/
/CAL:PRIMARY GAREGIVER DIVERSION PROG RPT, TRAILING COURT NO,22004622/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PRIMARY CAREGIVER PROGRESS REPORT/OR/CTORD:ACM IS TERMINATED/PROGPCD:01-11-22/CONTD: PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL: PRIMARY CARE GIVER DISVERSION REFERRAL/PROGPCD: 10-19-21/CONTD:PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION REFERRAL PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/
